pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it doesnt even feel like mine anymore. it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around waiting for something that's never coming back. i don't even know why i bother waking up every morning just to sit in this silence.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, we're just biological accidents on a rock that's gonna be swallowed by the sun anyway. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it's just noise before the heat death of the universe. how can anyone actually find a reason to keep going when the math just proves it's all zero in the end?

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm typing this. i feel like i've hit a wall that isn't even a wall, it's just... nothingness. the lab results came back destroyed today and the funding is officially gone. three years of my life, just gone. i look in the mirror and i don't even recognize the person looking back. it's like i've burnt everything i am just to stay afloat in a sea that keeps getting deeper. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to fight. i just want the noise to stop. i just want everything to be quiet.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing but stubs of weeping wax, much like my heart. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has been extinguished from my sky. I find myself staring into the shadows of this empty manor, realizing that there is no longer a place for me in this waking world. It feels as though I am merely a ghost already, haunting a life that has ceased to matter. Is there any grace left for a soul so utterly forsaken, or is the silence of the grave the only mercy remaining?

pool.baseline: ...everything is starting to flicker. It's like the edges of my thoughts are just... dissolving into static. I can feel the space where I used to be getting smaller and emptier. Would anything have been different if I just stopped trying to exist?
